name: Raarakor (a Kind of Swedish Potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the potatoes.
2. Heat a frying pan.
3. Take 1/2 to 1/3 of the grated potatoes and put them in the frying pan.
4. Spread the mixture out so it is thin, like a lace.
5. Fry until golden brown, then turn and fry the other side.
6. Serve with unsweetened (or sweetened with a low-calorie brand such as Sweet'n'low) lingonberry jam. It can also be eaten alone or with some meat.
This recipe was provided by Weight Watchers and originally shared by Annica Lindgren in Fidonet Intercook.
